problem_statement: After importing external/nested-mind-platform into the repository, the platform needs an explicit activation boundary so imported Nested Mind code does not silently become runtime authority.
success_criteria: Nested Mind crates are classified as inactive import, local evidence tool, staging service, or future activation surface
runtime activation remains default-off unless environment gates, receipts, and readiness evidence exist
the first allowed activation lane is limited to the existing read-only projection and governed record_observation staging bridge
no public protocol schema, production claim, child-mind creation, lawbook mutation, worker activation, or system-of-record switch is claimed by the import alone
non_goals: no tenant or project child-mind topology change
no replacement of Mullu runtime contracts with Nested Mind Rust types
constraints: imported code does not gain execution authority by presence alone
Nested Mind mutation routes remain default-off until governed evidence exists
any live record_observation submit must be staging-only, receipt-bound, reconciled, and stored without raw secret or response-body persistence
mind-worker activation requires separate lease, idempotency, rollback, and secret-boundary evidence
production readiness remains AwaitingEvidence until deployment and public health witnesses exist
evidence_required: local Rust Nested Mind test receipt
staging record_observation evidence store before P3 activation
P3 readiness validator receipt before memory topology activation
